Welcome To Tola & Tola

With years of versatile experience assisting clients from a myriad of industries, and a team consisting of a talented roster of professionals, our law practice ensures that every client’s matter is handled with utmost diligence and customised legal strategies.

Learn More

Areas of Practice

Taxation

With years of versatile experience assisting clients from a myriad of industries, and a team consisting of a talented roster of professionals, our law practice ensures that every client’s matter is handled with utmost diligence and customised legal strategies.
Civil Litigation
Backed by a team of professionals who hold a thorough familiarity with the system, our firm is able to expertly advise and lead cases as counsel to the clients, ensuring that every client can have ease in matters ranging from filing cases to post-trial scenarios, be it disputes between mega corporate entities or individual persons.

Criminal Litigation

Critically understanding the requirement for a strong advocacy in issues pertaining to criminal law, we place our utmost emphasis on having a skilled team of advocates that are trial specialists. Our professionals offer unflinching support in both defence and prosecution work to facilitate the client with fair and efficient application and trials. We not only offer representation in court, but also before the law enforcement agencies during initiating of case till conclusion of the investigation.

Constitutional & Administrative Law:

As practitioners of constitutional and administrative law, we find it our responsibility to systemize, regulate, and reform administrative authorities, including bodies of government, by means of the judicial system. We regularly appear in courts in constitutional cases ranging from enforcement of human rights to judicial review of state actions.

International Tax

Recognizing globalisation in the modern business world, our services extend to cater to individuals and corporations that are subject to taxes in multiple or more than two countries. Keeping at pace with the modern world, our team is well conversant with the modern complex international tax structures and developments related to the field of international tax law.
View All Areas Of Practices

Latest News

30 December 2022 The Honourable Sindh High Court Dismisses Petitions Challenging the Vires of the Capital Value Tax The Honourable High Court of Sindh (“SHC”) dismissed the Constitutional Petitions filed that challenged the vires of Section 8 of the Finance Act 2022 (commonly referred to as “Capital Value Tax or CVT”) vide judgment dated 30th December 2022. These petitions consisted of petitioners that owned foreign movable and immovable assets. The Petitions in which the Petitioners owned exclusively movable foreign properties were de-tagged and will be heard separately by the SHC.
22 December 2022 Capital Value Tax A single bench of the Honourable High Court of Lahore (“LHC”) has, vide a short order dated 22.12.2022, dismissed the Constitutional Petitions challenging the vires of the Capital Value Tax (“CVT”) levied through Section 8 of the Finance Act 2022. It remains to be seen whether the Petitioners will opt for an intra-court appeal before a Division Bench of the LHC.
22 December 2022 Super Tax The Honourable High Court of Sindh (“SHC”) has, vide a short Order dated 22.12.2022 (“said Order”), partially allowed the Constitutional Petitions challenging the vires of Section 4C of the Income Tax Ordinance 2001 (“ITO”), also known as the ‘Super Tax’. As per the said Order, the Super Tax will be

Famous Cases

Testimonials

I was in a difficult legal situation and didn't know where to turn. In these tough times, Tola and Tola came highly recommended and they did not disappoint me in the slightest with the way they took charge. They were able to navigate the complex case and achieve a positive outcome for me in ways unimaginable for me. Anonymous
As a small business owner, I was overwhelmed by the legal issues I was facing. But thr team at Tola and Tola, was able to not only provide knowledgeable and timely guidance, but also made me feel comfortable and supported me throughout the entire process. I am grateful for their assistance and highly recommend their services. Anonymous
I have worked with several law firms in the past, but none have compared to the level of service and personalised attention I received from Tola and Tola. The attorneys listened to my concerns and were able to craft a legal strategy that achieved my desired results in surprisingly smooth ways. With how impressed I was with their professionalism and dedication to their clients, I would highly recommend their services to anyone in need of legal representation. Khurram Amanullah
